app.name: Krishi-Verse
common.error.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
common.offline: You are offline. Changes will sync when you reconnect.
welcome.subtitle: Sell your crop, buy direct, grow your farm — all in one app.
language.title: Choose your language
language.subtitle: You can change this later in Settings.
otp.phoneHint: We'll send a 6-digit code by SMS.
otp.safety: For your safety, never share this OTP with anyone — not even Krishi-Verse staff.
otp.error.invalid: That code didn't work. Check it and try again.
otp.error.tooMany: Too many attempts. Please wait a moment and try again.
role.title: Choose your role
role.subtitle: Pick what fits you best. You can add more roles later.
role.farmer.desc: Sell your crops, book labour, manage your farm
role.buyer.desc: Buy fresh produce direct from farmers

review.notEligible: This order can't be reviewed yet.
review.failed: Could not submit the review. Please try again.
report.title: Report a problem
report.help: Tell us what went wrong with this order. Our team will look into it.
report.filed: Report filed. We'll be in touch.
report.tooShort: Please add a little more detail.
report.already: A report is already open for this order.
report.failed: Could not file the report. Please try again.
addMoney.title: Add money to wallet
addMoney.failed: Payment failed. No money was deducted.
addMoney.pending: Payment is being confirmed. Your balance will update shortly.
addMoney.secure: 🔒 Secure payment via UPI, card, or netbanking.
wallet.txnEmpty.title: No transactions yet
wallet.payoutEmpty.title: No payouts yet
wallet.payoutEmpty.message: Money you withdraw will appear here.
withdraw.title: Withdraw money
withdraw.note: Payouts are sent to your verified bank account, usually within a few hours.
withdraw.requested: Withdrawal requested. We'll update you when it's paid.
withdraw.exceeds: Amount is more than your available balance.
withdraw.notAllowed: Withdrawal not allowed yet. Complete your verification (KYC) first.
withdraw.failed: Could not request the withdrawal. Please try again.
withdraw.noAccount.title: No payout account
withdraw.noAccount.message: Add a bank or UPI account to withdraw money. This is coming soon.

editPrice.label: New price per quintal (₹)
editPrice.conflict: Price changed elsewhere. Reopen and try again.

notifications.empty.title: You're all caught up

prefs.quietHint: We won't disturb you during these hours.

cart.empty.message: Add produce from search or a listing.
cart.warn.unavailable: No longer available — remove to continue.
cart.warn.priceChanged: Price updated since you added this.

checkout.totalsNote: Delivery, taxes and any discount are calculated and shown on your order.
checkout.failed: Could not place the order. Please try again.
checkout.changed: Something changed in your cart. Please review and retry.

address.empty.message: Add a delivery address to check out.
buyer.orders.empty.title: No orders yet
buyer.orders.empty.message: Orders you place will appear here.
offer.title: My offers
offer.help: Propose a quantity and your price per unit. The seller can accept or counter.
offer.invalid: Enter a valid quantity and price.
offer.notAllowed: You can't make an offer on this listing.
offer.exists: You already have an open offer here.
offer.failed: Could not send the offer. Please try again.

chat.sendFailed: Message not sent. Tap to retry.

chat.empty.message: Start a chat from a listing.
chat.calling.title: Connecting…
chat.calling.message: We'll connect your call. Your number stays private.
worker.home.title: Work
worker.onboard.title: Set up your worker profile
worker.onboard.body: Tell us where you can work and your wage expectation. Your account is set up with help from a Krishi-Verse ambassador, and you must be 18+ with Aadhaar verification to accept work.
worker.verifyNote: Complete 18+ Aadhaar verification (with your ambassador) to accept work.
worker.verifyToAccept: You must be 18+ verified to accept work. Please complete verification.
worker.jobs.empty.title: No open jobs
worker.jobs.empty.message: New jobs near you will appear here.
worker.applyNote: Jobs are offered to you by the employer. Accepted offers appear under Offers.
worker.offers.empty.title: No offers yet
worker.offers.empty.message: Job offers from employers will appear here.
worker.respondBy: Please respond before the window closes.
worker.windowExpired: The response window has closed for this offer.
worker.cannotAccept: You can't accept this offer yet.
worker.saveFailed: Could not save. Please try again.
amb.commissions.title: Commissions
amb.leaderboard.title: Leaderboard
amb.leaderboard.soon.title: Leaderboard coming soon
amb.leaderboard.soon.message: Rankings will appear here soon. For now, track your own funnel on Home.
amb.targets.title: Targets
amb.targets.soon.title: Targets coming soon
amb.targets.soon.message: Your monthly targets will appear here soon.
amb.goals.title: Goal setting
amb.goals.soon.title: Goal setting coming soon
amb.goals.soon.message: You'll be able to set and track personal goals here soon.
amb.training.title: Training
amb.training.empty.title: No courses yet
amb.course.paymentRequired: This is a paid course — payment is required to enrol.
amb.lesson.title: Lesson
amb.lesson.videoUnavailable: This video isn't available right now.
amb.lesson.markFailed: Couldn't save progress. Please try again.
amb.quiz.title: Quiz
amb.quiz.submitFailed: Couldn't submit your quiz. Please try again.
amb.quiz.unavailable.title: No quiz here
amb.quiz.unavailable.message: This lesson doesn't have a quiz.
amb.quiz.retryNote: You can review the lesson and try again.
amb.faq.title: Help & FAQ
amb.faq.referral.a: Create a code, share it with a farmer, and you get credit when they sign up and enter it.
amb.faq.commission.a: Commission accrues when your farmers transact. It shows in Commissions, paid out by Krishi-Verse.
amb.faq.withdraw.a: Open Commissions → Withdraw to move your balance to your bank/UPI. The server processes the payout.
amb.faq.training.a: Enrol in a course, watch the lessons, and pass the quiz to complete it.
amb.profile.title: My profile
amb.home.title: Ambassador
amb.trainingPending: Complete your training to unlock all tools.
amb.home.notAmbassador.title: Not an ambassador yet
amb.home.notAmbassador.message: Your ambassador account is set up by Krishi-Verse. Contact your mentor to get started.
amb.funnel.title: Your farmers
amb.onboard.title: Onboard a farmer
amb.onboard.start.heading: Create a referral code
amb.onboard.start.body: Make a short code and share it with the farmer. When they sign up and enter it, you get credit for onboarding them.
amb.onboard.docsNote: The farmer scans their own Aadhaar during their KYC after signing up — you don't need their documents here.
amb.onboard.codeTaken: That code is already taken — try another.
amb.onboard.createFailed: Couldn't create the code. Please try again.
amb.onboard.complete.heading: Code ready
amb.onboard.complete.body: Share this code with the farmer. They enter it when they sign up.
amb.onboard.complete.steps: 1. Farmer installs the app  2. Signs up with their phone (OTP)  3. Enters this code  4. Completes KYC.
amb.onboard.scan.title: The farmer scans their own documents
amb.onboard.scan.message: For privacy, the farmer captures their Aadhaar/PAN during their own KYC after signing up. Assisted document upload from your device is coming soon.
amb.onboard.verify.title: The farmer verifies their own number
amb.onboard.verify.message: Phone verification is done by the farmer on their own phone (OTP). Guide them through it — assisted consent capture is coming soon.
amb.farmers.empty.title: No farmers yet
amb.farmers.empty.message: Onboard your first farmer with a referral code.
amb.earnings.payoutNote: Commission is paid out by Krishi-Verse — you can't move money from the app.
amb.earnings.empty.title: No earnings yet
amb.earnings.empty.message: Commission appears here as your farmers transact.
amb.visit.title: Visit log
amb.visit.heading: Log a field visit
amb.visit.body: Capture your current location to record a visit to a farmer.
amb.visit.comingSoon: Saving visits to the server is coming soon.
amb.help.title: Help a farmer
amb.help.listing.heading: Help the farmer create a listing
amb.help.listing.steps: On the farmer's phone: open Sell → Speak-to-Sell or add photos → set price & quantity → publish.
amb.help.order.heading: Help the farmer place an order
amb.help.order.steps: On the farmer's phone: open the item → add to cart → choose delivery → pay.
amb.help.onBehalfNote: For security, listings and orders are made on the farmer's own login — never on your account.

hire.book.taxonomy.title: Work type (coming soon)
hire.book.taxonomy.note: Choosing the work type, skill and region from a catalogue is coming soon — these fields are entered manually for now.
hire.book.belowFloor: Your offered wage is below the legal minimum for this work — raise it.
hire.book.failed: Couldn't post the booking. Please try again.
hire.book.err.taxonomy: Work type, skill, region and skill level are required.
hire.book.err.workers: Enter how many workers you need (1–500).
hire.book.err.dates: Enter valid start and end dates (end on/after start).
hire.book.err.wage: Enter a valid wage and wage type.
hire.sent.title: Booking posted
hire.sent.heading: Your booking is live
hire.sent.body: Workers will be offered this job and must confirm within your respond-by window.
hire.tally.title: Workers
hire.action.payConfirm: Pay the agreed wages to all accepted workers now?
hire.action.cancelConfirm: Cancel this booking? This can't be undone.
hire.action.terminal: No further actions for this booking.
hire.action.notAllowed: You're not allowed to do this.
hire.action.illegal: That action isn't allowed for this booking right now.

worker.clockIn.fence: You must be within 100 m of the farm to clock in.
worker.clockIn.comingSoon: You're at the farm. Attendance recording is coming soon.
worker.clockIn.gps.unavailable: Location isn't available on this device.
worker.clockIn.gps.denied: Allow location access to clock in.

auction.emdNote: A refundable deposit (EMD) is held from your wallet while you're the bidder, and returned if you don't win.

auction.outbid: You've been outbid — bid again to stay in.
auction.bidTooLow: Your bid is below the minimum next bid.
auction.bidRejected: Bid rejected — someone may have bid higher. Refresh and try again.

createAuction.help: Set a starting price and how long the auction runs. Buyers bid up from there.
